infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Grudge Map uses your location to wake nearby talking objects as you walk.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Grudge Map uses your camera so you can point at an object to wake it.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Grudge Map uses your microphone so you can talk back to the characters.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Grudge Map lets you pick a photo of an object to wake it.
